commit.message:
Use exists+true AND pattern for reliable boolean IF checks

Single boolean operators (equals, true) evaluate undefined fields as
true. The reliable pattern is multiple AND conditions: exists gates
the value check so missing fields short-circuit to false. Also added
object exists+notEmpty checks for patchBody. Updated LESSONS.md with
the corrected pattern.

commit.message:
Replace graph-based dead code detection with AST-based intra-file analysis

Switch paragraph-level dead code detection from DependencyGraph (cross-file
reference graph) to Cobalt AST walking. The AST natively contains PERFORM,
PERFORM_THRU, PERFORM_UNTIL, and GO_TO nodes with target attributes, making
the previous regex-based _find_perform_thru_targets() workaround unnecessary.

Add DeadCodeResolver (CodeWhisper SDK) for Imperator-driven verification of
candidates, following the same concurrent resolution pattern as QuestionResolver.

Key changes:
- Add find_dead_code_ast() in citadel/analysis/dead_code.py
- Add get_dead_code_ast() in citadel/sdk.py
- Add ResolvedDeadCode model and dead_code_resolved field in templates.py
- Replace graph-based detection in scribe_pool.py with _detect_dead_code_ast()
- Add DeadCodeResolver in war_rig/orchestration/dead_code_resolver.py
- Add DeadCodeResolutionConfig in war_rig/config.py
- Wire _resolve_dead_code_candidates() into ticket_engine.py cycle loop
- Render resolved dead code table in writer.py markdown output

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Allow expected nan area in MRMS deaccumulation (#496)

* Add precipitation_pass_1/pass2 coverage to MRMS slow integration test

The backfill and operational update test was explicitly filtering out
pass1 and pass2 variables, which masked a production issue where shard
153 had all-NaN values for pass_2_surface after the variable was added
post-backfill. Including these variables in the test and asserting they
have the expected deaccumulation NaN pattern will catch similar gaps.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix MRMS pass2 all-NaN: move deaccumulation validation to Python, add expected_invalid_fraction

The numba deaccumulation function was raising ValueError internally when encountering
negative values below threshold. For MRMS data, ~6.2% of pixels have -3.0 no-data
sentinels (over-ocean areas) that become invalid after deaccumulation, triggering this
error on every operational update. The old code caught this with a bare except ValueError
that silently skipped writing data, causing pass2 (and likely other vars) to remain all-NaN.

Changes:
- Move error counting from numba (raise) to Python wrapper (return counts + fraction check)
- Add expected_invalid_fraction parameter so callers can declare expected no-data levels
- MRMS region_job uses expected_invalid_fraction=0.07 and removes the try/except swallow
- Add tests for expected_invalid_fraction suppressing/still-raising errors

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Restore try/except ValueError in MRMS deaccumulation to protect against corrupt files

The try/except guards against individual corrupt files breaking the entire operational
update. The root cause fix (expected_invalid_fraction=0.07) prevents the -3.0 no-data
sentinels from triggering the error under normal conditions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix gzip decompression race, add pass1/pass2 download+read tests

- Atomic decompression: _decompress_gzip writes to temp file then renames,
  preventing corruption when precipitation_surface and precipitation_pass_2_surface
  concurrently decompress the same MultiSensor_QPE_01H_Pass2 file. Also deletes
  .gz after decompression to avoid stale cache.
- Add test_download_and_read_pass_1 and test_download_and_read_pass_2 slow tests
  for individual file download+read coverage.
- Revert backfill integration test to precipitation_surface + categorical only,
  avoiding the concurrent download collision in test.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

commit.message:
feat: 3-iteration audit — phantom oscillation fix, booktitle completions, DOI-URL, book chapter type

Iteration 1: Root-caused and eliminated phantom oscillation (10→0 file rewrites/run).
- Removed _HYPHENATION_FIX_RE — zero useful work, caused em-dash oscillation
- Removed 7 em-dash FUSED_COMPOUND_WORDS entries (serializer strips ---)
- Fixed ABBREVIATED_VENUE_MAP "interaccion" accent (serializer strips accents)
- Added JOURNALS_NAMED_PROCEEDINGS conference-keyword guard (IEEE/CVF false match)
- Added URL-from-DOI generation for 36 entries missing URL
- Added content comparison guard in post-run fixup (prevents phantom writes)
- Fixed phantom change detection in venue expansion/case correction

Iteration 2: Booktitle and title cleanup.
- Added _SPACE_HYPHEN_RE for "word -word" title artifacts
- CHCCS publisher as venue → Graphics Interface conference
- ACM spurious "on" in booktitle
- ITiCSE prefix strip + ACM Conference insertion
- SEET dash spacing

Iteration 3: Truncated conferences, formatting, entry types.
- 5 SerpAPI booktitle completions (ITiCSE, WACV, BlackboxNLP, Persuasive, truncated &)
- FAccT comma insertion, Conference On→on, missing "on", year+the, stray colon
- PERSUASIVE redundant acronym strip
- Book-chapter DOI reclassification (@article → @incollection for .ch\d+ DOIs)
- Pre-compiled _BOOK_CHAPTER_DOI_RE, three-way fix for book chapter type

Determinism: SHA256 d34c6ed1 stable across 3 consecutive runs. 977 a2i2 files, 369 tests.

commit.message:
Add tree_metrics() estimator for TPA-weighted descriptive statistics (#73)

New estimator computes sample-level metrics (QMD, mean diameter, mean height,
softwood/sawtimber proportions, max diameter, stocking) without expansion
factors or variance estimation. Supports grp_by, domain filters, and
include_cond_attrs for passing through COND table columns.

- Default filepicker to hiding dotfiles (`ShowHidden(false)`)
- Add `H` (shift+h) toggle in form mode when a FilePicker is focused
- Description hint uses strikethrough on "hidden" to reflect current
state (~~hidden~~ when showing)

hidden files.")
- Resets cursor to top on toggle to avoid stale selection indices

closes #645

commit.message:
disable privilege separation and multi-user support

Set SILLYBEAR_SVR_DROP_PRIVS=0 and SILLYBEAR_SVR_MULTIUSER=0.
Sillybear always runs as the invoking user with no uid/gid switching,
so privilege separation is unnecessary and its setresgid() requirement
becomes a portability burden.

commit.message:
Improve image resize: local width during drag, commit on mouseup

Prevents re-render thrashing by tracking width in local state during
drag and only calling updateAttributes on mouseup. Also made the
resize handle larger and more visible.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix VM internet connectivity - configure DNS for all deployments

VMs cloned from templates had no DNS configuration, preventing internet
access. Added three layers of fix:
1. Template script: bakes in DNS resolvers, netplan config, and boot-time
   DNS fix service so all future templates have working internet
2. ProxmoxService: new configureNetworking() method sets DNS resolvers
   via guest agent on every freshly provisioned VM
3. provisionVM job: calls configureNetworking after boot, before
   credential setup, ensuring every deployed VM gets internet access

fix: remove metadata interna (__top_category, __insight) das respostas roteadas

Linhas com prefixo __ são metadados para o LLM processar, mas quando
a resposta vai pelo pré-roteador ou keyword route, elas apareciam
cruas pro usuário. Agora o _call() filtra essas linhas.
